reason: $200K procurement-led POC deal; blockers are pure execution (0/5 POC use cases, McAfee-specific ROI, ~8-month-overdue commercial proposal) plus a still-unmapped, unengaged economic buyer — a VP/SVP/CRO can carry the exec-connect to McAfee's CFO/CIO and presales leadership can guarantee POC resources; no CEO-to-CEO peer relationship exists or is required.
